steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The phrase "since researchers are unable to control... therefore" creates a causal relationship. The first clause states a constraint (can’t control who wins elections), and the blank must show its consequence. The passage’s main challenge is finding comparable control groups, so the blank should directly reflect this difficulty.

steps.title: Match the consequence in the text
steps.content: D captures the problem of identifying a suitable control group given the researchers' lack of control over election outcomes. A, B, and C address unrelated issues (data limitations in A, timing of studies in B, or irrelevant group differences in C). That matches choice D — D is correct.
